issues: No data on permit mix shift.

answer: Since 2024, Austin's residential permits increased by 13,817 (34.0%), rising from 40,690 to 54,507. Commercial permits also grew, adding 4,771 (31.7%) and increasing from 15,057 to 19,828. While both categories saw significant growth, residential permits experienced a slightly higher percentage increase.
